query:
-- All reservations regardless of status
SELECT id, product_id, product_name, customer_name, status, amount_total, booking_date, channel, created_at
FROM reservations
ORDER BY created_at DESC
LIMIT 20;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2rp6zCMfN7Vv5FK.root --database AV298FS8t5SaTurBBRqhgQ --execute
